description: Upgrade plan to migrate project to latest LTS versions

tasks.description: Upgrade to Java 21 and Spring Boot 3.4
tasks.requirements: Upgrade JDK to 21, Spring Boot to 3.4, Spring Framework to 6.x, and migrate javax.* to jakarta.* namespace if needed. Update all related Spring dependencies (Spring Security, Spring Data, Spring Cloud, etc.) to versions compatible with Spring Boot 3.4. Address any deprecated APIs and breaking changes introduced across these major version upgrades.
